title: HMT Red Lithium Complex Grease EP2 – 12 x 400g Cartridges | NLGI 2 High Load EP Grease for Bearings, Automotive & Industrial Use | High Temp, Anti-Wear, Water Resistant, Corrosion Protection Lubricant
features: Premium Lithium Complex EP2 Grease – HMT Red Lithium Complex Grease EP2 is a top-quality, NLGI No.2 lubricant formulated with refined mineral base oils and a lithium complex thickener, offering superior lubrication, stability, and long service life

Exceptional Mechanical & Oxidation Stability – Maintains structure and consistency even under high mechanical stress; excellent oxidation resistance ensures lasting lubrication at elevated temperatures, extending relubrication intervals and reducing

Outstanding Extreme Pressure & Anti-Wear Protection – Enhanced with EP and anti-wear additives, this grease provides robust load-carrying performance up to 450kg Four Ball Weld Load, reducing metal-to-metal contact, friction, and component wear

Reliable Corrosion & Water Resistance – Offers excellent protection against rust and corrosion; performs effectively in wet or humid environments with water washout resistance of 3% and Emcor test 0:0, safeguarding components operating in harsh or

Versatile Application & Easy Use – Suitable for manual application, standard 400g grease guns, or centralized lubrication systems designed for NLGI 2 greases. Compatible with plain and anti-friction bearings, electric motors, wheel hubs, chassis, and
